medialive.channel.ac3settings.CfnAbout:
The settings for an AC3 audio encode in the output.

The parent of this entity is AudioCodecSettings.

medialive.channel.ac3settings.Bitrate.Description: The average bitrate in bits/second. Valid bitrates depend on the coding mode.

medialive.channel.ac3settings.BitstreamM.Description: Specifies the bitstream mode (bsmod) for the emitted AC-3 stream. For more information about these values, see ATSC A/52-2012.

medialive.channel.ac3settings.CodingMode.Description: The Dolby Digital coding mode. This determines the number of channels.

medialive.channel.ac3settings.Dialnorm.Description: Sets the dialnorm for the output. If excluded and the input audio is Dolby Digital, dialnorm is passed through.

medialive.channel.ac3settings.DrcProfile.Description: If set to filmStandard, adds dynamic range compression signaling to the output bitstream as defined in the Dolby Digital specification.

medialive.channel.ac3settings.LfeFilter.Description: When set to enabled, applies a 120Hz lowpass filter to the LFE channel prior to encoding. This is valid only in codingMode32Lfe mode.

medialive.channel.ac3settings.MetadataCo.Description: When set to followInput, encoder metadata is sourced from the DD, DD+, or DolbyE decoder that supplies this audio data. If the audio is supplied from one of these streams, the static metadata settings are used.
